positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The main elements are interconnected geometric trees, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and graceful crescent moon phases. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, and bright coral orange. The composition should be perfectly centered, with strong negative space around the main subjects. The overall aesthetic should be clean, elegant, and suitable for a screen print on dark fabric. Line work must be crisp and sharp, with crisp outlines and flat areas of color.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logos, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, photographic, hyperdetailed, realistic, ugly
